translation: Thus the Kanesh colony, say to Aššur-ilī, the messenger of Aššur-ilī, the messenger of the messenger of Aššur-mālik, and the messenger of the messenger of Aššur-mālik,
Of the matter of the City where they went to the City and they went to the City and they went to the City.
<gap> my representatives have seized us against Aššur-ilī and we seized us and we entered the storeroom and we entered the storeroom and took a verdict of the City, and we took a verdict of the City
Me and Mīšur son of Miššu-ilī seized us against the merchant and they gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššurs dagger.
